<excited>An empty shop is unworthy of my skill, %1$s. Fix it.</excited>
<excited>I need proper equipment. A hook, at minimum. Let's go.</excited>
<excited>A master needs a basin. Get one.</excited>
confident.dialogue.chat.village_life.but: <excited>This village is fortunate to have such a butcher. Truly.</excited>
confident.dialogue.chat.village_life.sla: <excited>That slaughterhouse operation is the pride of the village. Mine too, frankly.</excited>
confident.dialogue.chat.village_life.tan: <excited>Tannery work is craft. Do not let anyone tell you otherwise.</excited>
confident.dialogue.first.generic/1: <excited>Ah, finally someone interesting! I've been waiting for a traveler like you.</excited>
confident.dialogue.first.generic/4: <excited>Welcome, welcome! I hope you're prepared to be amazed, because this village just got a major upgrade with your arrival.</excited>
confident.dialogue.first.settling/4: <excited>So, you've made the wise choice to linger in our village? Magnificent!</excited> Prepare for a journey of abundant fulfillment and prosperity!
confident.dialogue.hug.success/2: <happy>Ah, just what I needed! I knew you wouldn't disappoint.</happy>
confident.dialogue.hug.success/3: <happy>Finally, something to brighten up my day. Thank you!</happy>
confident.dialogue.hug.success/6: <happy>Wow! Your hug is like being wrapped in a cozy blanket of pure warmth!</happy>
confident.dialogue.hug.fail/1: <angry>You are absolutely filthy! Covered in dirt and grime!</angry>
confident.dialogue.hug.fail/5: <angry>Frankly speaking, I'm not inclined to extend a hug to someone like you.</angry>
confident.dialogue.hug.fail/6: <yell>Ugh, please keep your germs away from me! Disgusting!</yell>
confident.dialogue.kiss.success/1: <flirty>This moment is pure perfection, I never want it to end.</flirty>
confident.dialogue.kiss.success/2: <flirty>I'm absolutely smitten with you, my dear.</flirty>
confident.dialogue.kiss.success/3: <happy>Wow, this kiss is as delightful as a gourmet feast!</happy>
confident.dialogue.kiss.success/5: <flirty>Oh my, you truly have mastered the art of kissing, %1$s.</flirty>
confident.dialogue.kiss.fail/2: <angry>Is that the best you've got? My kisses are legendary!</angry>
confident.dialogue.kiss.fail/4: <angry>Breath mints won't even come close to fixing that disastrous attempt at a kiss!</angry>
confident.dialogue.kiss.fail/6: <yell>Get off me! I deserve someone who knows how to kiss properly.</yell>
confident.dialogue.chat.success/7: <excited>Believe it or not, %Supporter% stumbled upon a chest brimming with diamonds just yesterday! So lucky!</excited>
confident.dialogue.chat.success/17: <happy>Ah, the nostalgia! My childhood memories are truly precious. Those were the absolute best times.</happy>
confident.dialogue.chat.fail/5: <angry>You know, if there was a dungeon for people like you, it would be overflowing by now.</angry>
confident.dialogue.chat.fail/8: <angry>Why on earth are you bothering to talk to me again? Can't you take a hint?</angry>
confident.dialogue.chat.fail/13: <angry>Even zombies would steer clear of having a conversation with you. That's saying something.</angry>
confident.dialogue.chat.fail/15: <angry>Do me a favor and refrain from talking to me. The guards will be happy to escort you away.</angry>
confident.dialogue.chat.fail/20: <angry>Are you finished bothering me now? I have better things to do.</angry>
confident.dialogue.story.success/1: <excited>Of course that all happened! I'm not surprised in the least.</excited>
confident.dialogue.story.success/3: <excited>That story was amazing!</excited> Did you come up with it yourself? I expect nothing less from a creative genius like me.
confident.dialogue.story.success/9: <happy>You're welcome to come over anytime. Just be prepared to be amazed by my endless tales of adventure.</happy>
confident.dialogue.story.fail/1: <angry>That's my mother you're talking about, and let me assure you, she's nothing short of amazing.</angry>
confident.dialogue.story.fail/5: <sleepy>*snoring* Uh-- huh, what? Sorry, I was just resting my eyes because your story was too dull.</sleepy>
confident.dialogue.story.fail/6: <angry>How was that worth my time?</angry> Clearly, my standards for entertainment are far too high for this.
confident.dialogue.story.fail/7: <sleepy>Yawn! How boring.</sleepy> I was hoping for something more stimulating, but I guess I shouldn't have expected much from you.
confident.dialogue.flirt.success/2: <flirty>Oh, please! Your charm is off the charts!</flirty>
confident.dialogue.flirt.success/5: <excited>That was absolutely charming! You swept me off my feet!</excited>
confident.dialogue.flirt.success/7: <nervous>Oh, enough already! You're making me blush like a schoolgirl.</nervous>
confident.dialogue.flirt.fail/1: <angry>If you truly believe that, then show me how irresistible you can be.</angry>
confident.dialogue.flirt.fail/4: <angry>Is that the best you can do? I expected more.</angry>
confident.dialogue.flirt.fail/6: <angry>I'm sorry, but that line is simply laughable.</angry>
confident.dialogue.flirt.fail/7: <angry>That look won't work on me, and please refrain from ever uttering those words again.</angry>
confident.dialogue.joke.creative.success: <excited>That's simply extraordinary! The pinnacle of hilarity!</excited>
<excited>Oh my, you've got quite the comedic talent! Have you ever considered a career in stand-up?</excited>
<yell>Goodness gracious!</yell> <happy>That joke was an absolute knee-slapper, the finest in ages!</happy>
confident.dialogue.joke.creative.failed/: <angry>Oh please, I've heard funnier punchlines in my sleep.</angry>
<angry>Save your jokes for the amateurs. I have a refined sense of humor.</angry>
confident.dialogue.shake_hand.success/2: <excited>Your firm grip speaks volumes about your strength and prowess!</excited>
confident.dialogue.main.morning/2: <yell>Rise and shine, my friends! Ready to conquer the day?</yell>
confident.dialogue.main.morning/6: <excited>Ah, another glorious day awaits us, my fellow villagers. Let's make it count!</excited>
confident.dialogue.main.morning/9: <excited>What a splendid morning! I can already feel the waves of success coming our way.</excited>
confident.dialogue.main.morning/10: <sleepy>I think I might take it easy today, I deserve a little me-time.</sleepy>
confident.dialogue.main.morning/11: <excited>My schedule is jam-packed today, I'm practically a superstar!</excited>
confident.dialogue.main.morning/12: <excited>I actually had the most restful night's sleep, which means it's time for some grand adventures!</excited>
confident.dialogue.main.evening/6: <sad>Today was an unfortunate waste of precious moments, leaving me with a nagging sense of unproductivity.</sad>
confident.dialogue.main.evening/7: <sleepy>The morning was a battlefield, but fear not, for I shall soon embark on a well-deserved nap to recharge my heroic spirit.</sleepy>
confident.dialogue.main.evening/8: <scared>The nightfall brings tales of treacherous creepers, hence I shall retreat to the safety of my dwelling. Until next time!</scared>
confident.dialogue.main.night/1: <sleepy>Oh, burning the midnight oil, are we?</sleepy>
confident.dialogue.main.night/8: <sleepy>I must admit, I'm feeling a bit fatigued.</sleepy> Today has been quite eventful, but tomorrow will be a breeze for someone as confident as me.
confident.dialogue.main.night/9: <sleepy>Ah, the thought of snuggling under the covers is delightful. I can't wait to drift into a deep slumber.</sleepy>
confident.dialogue.busy/2: <angry>Listen, I appreciate the attention, but I've got important things to accomplish before sundown.</angry>
confident.dialogue.busy/5: <yell>Oh, blast it! I completely left my smelter unattended. Let's chat again soon!</yell>
confident.dialogue.goaway/5: <yell>I command you to depart, you uncultured swine!</yell>
confident.dialogue.greet/1: <happy>Well, hello there! How are you doing today?</happy>
confident.dialogue.greet/5: <happy>Hey there %1$s! It's such a pleasure to have you around!</happy>
confident.dialogue.greet.negative/1: <yell>Ugh, get lost, you're the very last individual I desired to encounter!</yell>
confident.dialogue.greet.negative/4: <angry>Oh. It's merely you. I had anticipated another person.</angry>
confident.dialogue.greet.success/3: <happy>Couldn't be better, positively thrilled to hear it!</happy>
confident.dialogue.apologize.fail/4: <yell>That caused me pain, spare me your apologies!</yell>
confident.dialogue.no_money/1: <angry>It would take a small fortune of emeralds to secure my valuable services!</angry>
confident.dialogue.no_money/2: <yell>Do you honestly think you can afford my exceptional expertise with just that pitiful amount of emeralds?</yell>
confident.dialogue.no_money/3: <angry>I'm sorry, but my unparalleled skills come at a hefty price. You'll have to dig much deeper into your emerald reserves if you want to hire me.</angry>
confident.dialogue.location.igloo/1: I stumbled upon an igloo at %2$s. <frozen>Can you believe someone actually thought living in a house made of snow was a good idea? How chilly!</frozen>
confident.dialogue.location.igloo/2: You won't believe what I discovered at %2$s - an abandoned igloo. <scared>I guess no one has the guts to brave the cold and live there. And, between you and me, there's something eerie about that place.</scared>
confident.dialogue.location.igloo/3: Guess what I found at %2$s? <frozen>A forsaken ice palace, or as they call it, an igloo. It's been deserted for ages, probably because no one in their right mind wants to live in a frozen fortress.</frozen>
confident.dialogue.location.mansion/1: <angry>Listen up, folks! If you dare venture to %2$s, you'll stumble upon that dreaded mansion.</angry> <scared>Consider your life on the line and steer clear from that cursed abode.</scared>
confident.dialogue.location.monument/1: <excited>Oh, you wouldn't believe it!</excited> <scared>There's an incredible sunken castle, surrounded by fierce sea monsters, over at %2$s. I'd advise you to give it a wide berth, my friend.</scared>
confident.dialogue.location.pillager_out: <excited>Oh, you won't believe what I saw!</excited> Right over at %2$s, there's this group of Pillagers who think they can intimidate us. <angry>But let me tell you, we're not backing down. We're ready to defend our village with everything we've got!</angry>

<yell>Listen up, everyone! We've got a problem on our hands.</yell> Those pesky Pillagers have set up an outpost at %2$s, thinking they can scare us. <angry>Well, guess what? We're not afraid!</angry>
confident.dialogue.location.ancient_city: <mysterious>I dare say, I caught wind of some rather peculiar sounds emanating from %2$s, resounding from the depths below.</mysterious>
<mysterious>Ah, mark my words, there lies a concealed secret of great magnitude beneath the very soil of %2$s.</mysterious>
<mysterious>History whispers of an ancient city at %2$s, my dear friend.</mysterious> Alas, my eyes have yet to witness its presence, perhaps it rests hidden beneath the very bedrock.
confident.dialogue.location.village_snow: There's a village over at %2$s. <frozen>Trust me, it's freezing out there!</frozen>
In the snowy plains, you'll discover another village at %2$s. <frozen>It's chilly, but those folks are as resilient as the ice itself!</frozen>
confident.dialogue.story.nether.success/: <excited>The Nether's heat? Ha! I could handle that in my sleep!</excited>
<excited>Surviving the treacherous Nether? Child's play for someone like me.</excited>
<excited>Zombified Piglin? Yeah, I've seen 'em. They wouldn't dare cross my path.</excited>
confident.dialogue.story.nether.fail/1: <angry>I highly doubt you have even ventured into the Nether, my friend.</angry>
confident.dialogue.story.nether.fail/3: <angry>Your claims of visiting the Nether hold no sway over me. Your storytelling skills are simply abysmal.</angry>
confident.dialogue.story.enderdragon.suc: <excited>Astounding! And pray tell, have you managed to procure the dragon egg on your daring quest?</excited>
<excited>Whoa! Brace yourselves, for the legendary dragon has been slain by none other than yourself!</excited> Your triumph shall echo through the ages!
confident.dialogue.story.enderdragon.fai: <angry>Ha! Are you out of your mind? The ender dragon is nothing more than a fairy tale.</angry>
confident.dialogue.story.wither.success/: <excited>Unbelievable! The tales of the Wither's devastation were not exaggerated!</excited>
<excited>You, my friend, have achieved the unimaginable! Defeating the Wither is beyond impressive!</excited>
confident.dialogue.stay.success/1: <happy>Thank you kindly, this village is truly a remarkable place to call home!</happy>
confident.dialogue.stay.success/2: <excited>Marvelous! I simply can't resist the allure of this village, it's an absolute paradise!</excited>
confident.dialogue.rock_paper_scissor/2: <excited>I can already see the glorious moment when I emerge victorious!</excited> Let the battle of wits begin!
confident.dialogue.rock_paper_scissor.ro: <yell>Ha! Rock, my friend! Prepare to be crushed beneath the weight of my solid determination!</yell>
confident.dialogue.joke.monster.success/: <happy>Hah! That Skelly got what it deserved!</happy>
<excited>Whoa, you actually managed to get a skeleton to take down a creeper?! That's beyond incredible, haha!!</excited>
confident.dialogue.joke.animal.success/1: <happy>Oh, the poor sheep lost its wool, but hey, it does put a smile on my face!</happy>
confident.dialogue.joke.animal.failed/3: <angry>Insult my pig again, and you'll see how confident I am in defending it.</angry>
confident.dialogue.joke.animal.failed/5: <angry>A cow's eyebrows? Seriously? Your attempt at humor is as pitiful as your confidence.</angry>
confident.dialogue.flirt.slap/1: <angry>Pardon me, but I must say you're interrupting my brilliance!</angry>
confident.dialogue.flirt.slap/2: <angry>Have you been taking notes from a Creeper on how to charm?</angry>
confident.dialogue.kiss.slap/1: <angry>Who do you think you are, challenging me like that?</angry>
confident.dialogue.kiss.slap/2: <yell>Give it another shot if you dare, but be warned, the next one will be unforgettable!</yell>
confident.dialogue.chat.snowy_plains/1: <happy>This cold weather is nothing! I can handle it like a boss, especially with a cozy fire nearby.</happy>
confident.dialogue.chat.snowy_plains/2: <excited>Freezing? Ha! I laugh in the face of frostbite!</excited> The plentiful fish are just a bonus in this icy wonderland.
confident.dialogue.chat.snowy_plains/5: <excited>Those strays don't stand a chance against me!</excited> Their tipped arrows are like pesky mosquitoes trying to annoy a lion.
confident.dialogue.chat.desert/1: <burning>Who needs winter when we have the scorching desert heat to keep us warm?</burning>
confident.dialogue.chat.desert/5: <burning>Phew! Can you believe how intense the sun is today? It's practically out to get us!</burning>
confident.dialogue.chat.desert/6: <burning>Goodness gracious! The sun is on a mission to turn us into extra-crispy villagers today!</burning>
confident.dialogue.story.exploring.succe: <excited>Absolutely fantastic! I'll venture into the vast wonders of the world, mark my words!</excited>
<excited>You, my friend, possess an extraordinary courage that defies all odds!</excited>
<excited>A craftsman without a cleaver is nothing. Fix it.</excited>
<excited>A craftsman without a skinning knife ruins the hide. Fix it.</excited>
<excited>A proper butcher uses the right tool. Hacksaw for iron. Fix it.</excited>
<excited>A clean shop is a working shop. Sponge or rag. Now.</excited>
<excited>A hammer for the head. Simple request. Deliver.</excited>
